revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:天穂日命神社]] {{Expand Japanese|天穂日命神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto Shrine | native_name = 天穂日命神社 | image = Amenohohinomikoto shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.504297|134.125335}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ame no Hohi|lt=Ame no Hohi|bg|Аме Но Хохи|en|Ame no Hohi|fa|آمه-نو-هوهی|fr|Ame no Hohi|it|Ame no Hohi|ja|アメノホヒ|pl|Niebiański Duch Przewodni|ru|Амэ но Хохи|simple|Ame no Hohi|zh|天菩比神|qid=Q10940685|1=Ame no Hohi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Amenohohinomikoto Shrine'''|天穂日命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Inaba Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11420254|ltq=Q11420254|qid=Q11420254|1=List of Shikinaisha in Inaba Province}} ** Series ordinal: 33 ** P155: {{ill|Shitori Shrine|lt=Shitori Shrine|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)|qid=Q28685016|1=Shidori Shrine (Tottori)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040747|ltq=Q135040747|qid=Q135040747|1=Amahinatorino- Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Tottori (city)|lt=Tottori|an|Tottori|ar|توتوري (توتوري)|arz|توتورى|azb|توتوری (شهر)|ban|Tottori, Tottori|be|Таторы (горад)|ca|Tottori|ceb|Tottori (kapital sa prepektura sa Hapon)|ce|Тоттори (гӀала)|cs|Tottori|da|Tottori (by)|de|Tottori|devoyage|Tottori|en|Tottori (city)|envoyage|Tottori|eo|Totoro|es|Tottori (Tottori)|et|Tottori|eu|Tottori|fa|توتوری (شهر)|fi|Tottori|fr|Tottori|frvoyage|Tottori|ga|Tottori|gl|Tottori|hak|Tottori-sṳ|hy|Տոտորի|id|Tottori, Tottori|it|Tottori|ja|鳥取市|javoyage|鳥取市|ko|돗토리시|lt|Totoris|mzn|توتوری (شهر)|nl|Tottori (stad)|no|Tottori (by)|os|Тоттори (сахар)|pl|Tottori|plvoyage|Tottori|pt|Tottori (cidade)|ptvoyage|Tottori|ro|Tottori|ru|Тоттори (город)|sc|Tottori|sd|توتوري شهر|sh|Totori|simple|Tottori (city)|sr|Тотори|sv|Tottori|sw|Tottori, Tottori|szl|Tottori|tg|Тоттори|th|ทตโตริ (เมือง)|tl|Lungsod ng Tottori|tok|ma tomo Totoli|tr|Tottori|tt|Тоттори (шәһәр)|uk|Тотторі|ur|توتوری، توتوری|vi|Tottori (thành phố)|war|Tottori, Tottori|zh_classical|鳥取市|zh_min_nan|Tottori-chhī|zh_yue|鳥取市|zh|鳥取市|zhvoyage|鳥取|qid=Q200731|1=Tottori (city)}} * {{ill|Inaba Province|lt=Inaba Province|cs|Provincie Inaba|de|Provinz Inaba|en|Inaba Province|es|Provincia de Inaba|fa|ولایت اینابا|fr|Province d'Inaba|gl|Provincia de Inaba|id|Provinsi Inaba|it|Inaba (provincia)|ja|因幡国|ko|이나바국|lt|Inabos žemė|nl|Inaba (provincie)|pt|Província de Inaba|ru|Инаба (провинция)|simple|Inaba Province|sk|Inaba (provincia)|sr|Провинција Инаба|th|แคว้นอินาบะ|tr|Inaba (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Інаба|zh_min_nan|Inaba-kok|zh|因幡國|qid=Q1054338|1=Inaba Province}} * {{ill|Takakusa district|lt=Takakusa district|ja|高草郡|pl|Powiat Takakusa|zh|高草郡|qid=Q11672760|1=Takakusa district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.504297|134.125335}} == image (P18) == * Amenohohinomikoto shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q10940685|ltq=Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|1=Ame no Hohi}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306093632/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/390801.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182759 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3270005000536 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '鳥取県鳥取市福井字宮ノ谷361', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:天穂日命神社]] {{wikidata link|Q17191844}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name=Amenohohi-no-Mikoto Shrine |Image=[[File:Amenohohinomikoto shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Tottori Prefecture|Q133935|qid=Q133935|1=Tottori Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tottori City|Q200731|qid=Q200731|1=Tottori (city)}}Fukui, aza Miyanotani 361 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amenohohi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Founded=Unknown |Main hall={{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Annual festival={{ill|lt=April 17|Q2520|qid=Q2520|1=April 17}} |Map= {{Location map|Japan Tottori|label=Amenohohi-no-Mikoto
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Amenohohi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめのほひのみことじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Fukui, {{ill|lt=Tottori City|Q200731|qid=Q200731|1=Tottori (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tottori Prefecture|Q133935|qid=Q133935|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN|lt=minor shrine listed in the Engishiki}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === It is located to the west of the Fukui hamlet in Tottori City. The principal enshrined deity is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amenohohi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, who is said to have been the tutelary deity of the ancient {{ill|lt=Inaba Province|Q1054338|qid=Q1054338|1=Inaba Province}} {{ill|lt=local ruling clan|Q84066|qid=Q84066|1=Gōzoku}}, the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inaba no Kuni no Miyatsuko clan|1=UNKNOWN}}. Behind the shrine precincts, something believed to be a {{ill|lt=zenpō-kōen-fun|Q11268718|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (keyhole-shaped burial mound) has been identified, suggesting a connection with the Inaba no Kuni no Miyatsuko clan. Nearby are {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amehinatori-no-Mikoto Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, which enshrines Amenohohi-no-Mikoto’s child {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amehinatori-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mikuma Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, which enshrines {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mikuma-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (officially called “Atagatsutake Mikuma-no-Mikoto Shrine”). === History === The date of foundation is unknown. According to the {{ill|lt=Inaba-shi|Q11420257|qid=Q11420257|1=Inaba-shi}}, it was originally located at the present site of {{ill|lt=Hiyoshi Shrine (Tottori City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Hiyoshi Shrine}} in Fuse, {{ill|lt=Takakusa District|Q11672760|qid=Q11672760|1=Takakusa district}}. It was worshiped as the tutelary shrine of the ancient local ruling clan, the Inaba no Kuni no Miyatsuko, and grew alongside the expansion of that clan’s power. In the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japanese era)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} (May {{ill|lt=867|Q30347|qid=Q30347|1=867}}), it was granted the rank of {{ill|lt=Shōsanmi|Q11123261|qid=Q11123261|1=Senior Third Rank}} and was listed as an official shrine. By the mid-{{ill|lt=9th century|Q8083|qid=Q8083|1=9th century}}, it ranked above {{ill|lt=Ube Shrine|Q246447|qid=Q246447|1=Ube Shrine}} in divine rank and was the foremost shrine in Inaba Province. It is recorded in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} as one of the seven minor shrines of Takakusa District. It is thought to have been relocated to its present site in the late {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|qid=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was known as Muō Daimyōjin. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1868|Q7717|qid=Q7717|1=1868}}), it was renamed to its current name, and in the 3rd year of Meiji ({{ill|lt=1870|Q7741|qid=Q7741|1=1870}}), the Arafune Shrine of Fukui Village was merged into it. In the 12th year of Meiji ({{ill|lt=1879|Q7783|qid=Q7783|1=1879}}), Arafune Shrine was re-established as Arafune Shrine at its original site, but in the 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} ({{ill|lt=1914|Q2083|qid=Q2083|1=1914}}), it was merged back into this shrine together with an Inari Shrine. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inaba no Kuni no Miyatsuko clan|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amehinatori-no-Mikoto Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mikuma Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|lt=Amenohohi|Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|1=Ame no Hohi}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Inaba Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Inaba Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Tottori (city)]] [[Category:History of Tottori]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Tottori (city)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tottori Prefecture]]
